scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:dist
scripts.verify:publish: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:dist && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm run verify:publish
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm run verify:publish
scripts.release:patch:local: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run verify:publish
scripts.release:minor:local: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && npm run verify:publish
